Class UUIDProperty

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly.ReadOnlyUUIDProperty

All Implemented Interfaces:
Observable, ObservableValue<UUID>, ReadOnlyProperty<UUID>, Property<UUID>, ObservableObjectValue<UUID>, ObservableUUIDValue, WritableObjectValue<UUID>, WritableUUIDValue, WritableValue<UUID>
